sizing_rule.note: Risk 3% of account per trade, scaled inversely to market volatility (ATR/Close ratio). Position size adjusted by stop loss width (2.5x ATR) and volatility adjustment factor (1.5x). Apply only when account equity > 2x minimum size. Maintains max drawdown tolerance of 40%.

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position size based on the tightness of their stop loss and market volatility to avoid excessive drawdown while optimizing reward-to-risk ratios, rather than using a fixed equal-units model.
